title: Outcome-metrics dashboard + 'covered/missing' public ledger
context: M6 sustainability. A public dashboard and ledger tracking outcomes and what is covered vs still missing, including license-violation count (target 0). Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Build the outcome-metrics dashboard and the 'covered/missing' public ledger.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard tracks PLAN §4 metrics including license-violation count (target 0).
Public ledger shows what is curated vs what is still missing.
output: A pull request adding the outcome-metrics dashboard and the covered/missing public ledger.
